features: Laundry Basket Size:36*36*58cm, 75L Large Laundry Basket Black
Foldable Design The collapsible laundry basket is collapsible, making it easy to hold when not in use. It significantly reduces space and is also convenient for travel.

CONVENIENT SIDE POCKET Foldable laundry basket with side pocket provides ample extra storage space for laundry accessories such as detergent, dryer sheets, stain removers, socks and other personal items.
BREATHABLE MESH Mesh is the main material of this laundry basket, which helps to protect laundries from mold and moth damage. Allows air to circulate to eliminate moisture and odors

MULTIPURPOSE These foldable laundry baskets can be used to store daily clothes in closets, bathrooms and bedrooms. In addition, the laundry basket can storage baskets for children's toys, small items and also ideal for college dorms.
